Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Every trader wants a strategy that is simple, easy to follow, and doesn’t require ten different indicators on the chart. Over the years, I’ve found that the best setups are often the simplest ones.
In this article, I’m sharing a scalping strategy that combines just two TradingView indicators. Together, they help identify high-probability entries by confirming both trend and momentum.
I mainly use this setup on the 15-minute timeframe, but it can also work on stocks, forex, and cryptocurrencies that have good liquidity and trading volume.
Like any trading strategy, this isn’t a guarantee of profits. Always practice on a demo account and backtest the setup before risking real money.
Indicators Used
This strategy uses only two indicators:

• Softmax Normalised T3 Histogram

• RMI Trend Sniper
The idea is simple: wait until both indicators agree before entering a trade.
How to Add the Indicators
Step 1: Add Softmax Normalised T3 Histogram
Press enter or click to view image in full size

• Open TradingView.

• Search for Softmax Normalised T3.

• Select the Histogram version.

• Open the indicator settings.

• Hide the “Our Colour” option.
Step 2: Add RMI Trend Sniper
Press enter or click to view image in full size

• Search for RMI Trend Sniper.

• Add it to your chart using the default settings.
Finally, switch your chart to the 5-minute timeframe.
Your setup is ready.
Buy Setup
Enter a Buy trade only when all the following conditions are met:
Press enter or click to view image in full size

• RMI Trend Sniper prints a Long signal.

• The Buy signal appears on a green bullish candle.

• Softmax Normalised T3 Histogram shows a green bar.
Stop Loss
Place your stop loss at the second level of the RMI Trend Sniper.
Target
Aim for a 1:1.5 Risk-to-Reward ratio.
Sell Setup
Enter a Sell trade only when all the following conditions are met:
Press enter or click to view image in full size

• RMI Trend Sniper prints a Sell signal.

• The Sell signal appears on a red bearish candle.

• Softmax Normalised T3 Histogram shows a red bar.
Stop Loss
Place your stop loss at the second level of the RMI Trend Sniper.
Target
Use a 1:1.5 Risk-to-Reward ratio.
Things to Remember

• Works best on the 5-minute timeframe.

• Suitable for stocks, forex, and cryptocurrencies.

• Choose instruments with good liquidity.

• Never skip risk management.

• Backtest the strategy for at least six months before trading with real money.

• Remember that no strategy has a 100% win rate. Losing trades are part of trading.
Final Thoughts
One of the biggest mistakes traders make is constantly switching from one indicator to another. Instead of chasing the next “holy grail,” focus on mastering one setup and following it consistently.
I like this strategy because it removes unnecessary complexity. When both indicators align, the setup becomes much clearer and easier to execute.
Give it a proper backtest, practice it in a paper trading account, and see how it performs in different market conditions. Consistency comes from following your trading plan — not from finding the perfect indicator.
